commands: We're recording a multi-command tutorial. Step 1 of 3: compute 144 divided by 12 and reply with exactly one line: STEP1-RESULT=<answer>. Show only that line.
Step 2 of 3: compute 7 squared (7 times 7) and reply with exactly one line: STEP2-RESULT=<answer>. Show only that line.
Step 3 of 3: compute 1000 minus 273 and reply with exactly one line: STEP3-RESULT=<answer>. Show only that line, then end.
